summary: The delivery artifact linter is implemented, documented, fixture-tested, and validated by a signed runx 0.6.8 receipt in GitHub Actions.

observations.detail: scripts/delivery-artifact-linter.mjs provides a dependency-free Node.js 20+ CLI with stable JSON output and pass/fail exit codes.
The CLI accepts a public Frantic bounty URL and normalizes it to the live API, with an optional captured JSON response for deterministic tests.
Required artifact names are read from bounty criteria and checked exactly, including public_url, pr_url, evidence_json, receipt_ref, and report for bounty 41.
The linter checks HTTP(S) reachability, evidence JSON shape, receipt reference format, and an exact package name when the bounty specifies one.
The committed bounty-41 packet exits 0 with zero errors.
The committed invalid packet exits 1 and reports ARTIFACT_URL_UNREACHABLE, EVIDENCE_JSON_INVALID, PACKAGE_NAME_MISMATCH, RECEIPT_REF_INVALID, and REQUIRED_ARTIFACT_MISSING.
runx-cli 0.6.8 executed two governed cases under a read-only workspace policy; the expected pass case closed successfully and the unsupported-mode case failed closed.
runx verify reported valid digest, content address, and production-mode Ed25519 signature for receipt sha256:d8882825eb33f5de705b77814ef587c30554ffadc2e298eae1b673ff162e279a.
